title: jet target capability profiles
description: Schema for target-profiles.yaml. Each profile describes one target (web, desktop, tui). Build pipeline (#1239) consumes this file to wire renderer feature flags and reject UI sources that demand absent capabilities.

version.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking change.

profiles.description: One entry per target. Targets are uniquely identified by `target`.

degradation_rules.description: Cross-reference table. Every degradation.id mentioned in any profile MUST appear here.

inherits.description: If non-null, this profile inherits all fields from the named target. Fields supplied below override the inherited values.

overrides.description: Used in tandem with `inherits`. Annotates which inherited fields are intentionally extended (e.g., desktop's lifecycle event sources). Free-form; informational.

display_kinds.description: Subset of ../../wasm-renderer/layout-runtime.md DisplayKind enum. Targets MUST NOT extend; they MAY restrict.

pointer.description: true / false / 'optional'. 'optional' = capability resolved at runtime by the renderer.

events.description: Subset of SyntheticEvent variants supported. Targets MUST NOT advertise events they cannot source.

hooks.description: Hooks the target supports. Per C7 every target MUST support the full hook set; this field is informational/audit-only.

max_layout_nodes.description: Informational. No hard cap is enforced.

degradation.description: Per-target list of degradation rules that apply. IDs MUST cross-reference top-level degradation_rules[].

notes.description: Free-form prose. Build pipeline ignores; humans read.

MarkdownCapability.description: Per-feature Markdown rendering capability matrix. Consumed by the <markdown> element-contract intrinsic and by app code via use_target().markdown. Per-feature drop on TUI is governed by degradation rule T11.

tables.description: GFM tables. TUI = false → T11 placeholder.

links.description: Hyperlinks. Clickable on web/desktop; rendered as label + footnote-style URL on TUI.

severity.description: info = silent; warn = build emits warning; error = build refuses.
